prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia uses a fine filter net to separate useful information pearls from noisy clickbait cards and ad scraps. The useful notes are few but clear.

Core meaning: information filtering and source judgment are essential because search results contain a lot of low-quality noise.

Style: Chinese blog illustration, clean and playful, black/red/white, small blue useful highlights. Minimal labels: "过滤", "广告", "有效信息".

Avoid naming real bad sites, avoid too much text, avoid messy clutter.
